ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "date_listed" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Square footage of living space */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the property */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking available */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces available */,
  "hoa_fees" REAL /* Monthly Homeowners Association (HOA) fees */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "waterfront" TEXT /* Whether the property has a waterfront view */,
  "view" TEXT /* Whether the property has a view */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition rating of the property */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the property */,
  "sqft_above" INTEGER /* Square footage of space above ground level */,
  "sqft_basement" INTEGER /* Square footage of basement space */,
  "yr_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "yr_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the property location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "sqft_living15" INTEGER /* Square footage of living space in 2015 */,
  "sqft_lot15" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot in 2015 */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Sales price of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES locations ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, financed, auction) */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, closed, cancelled) */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date of closing */,
  "closing_attorney" TEXT /* Name of the closing attorney */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent involved in the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event */,
  "event_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sale, renovation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood name */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the agent's team */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Specialties of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the buyer */,
  "represented_by" TEXT /* Name of the agent representing the buyer */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used */,
  "financing_terms" TEXT /* Financing terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appraisals" (
  "appraisal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appraisal */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being appraised */,
  "appraisal_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was appraised */,
  "appraisal_method" TEXT /* Appraisal method used */,
  "appraised_value" TEXT /* Appraised value of the property */,
  "appraiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appraiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appraisal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appraisals_appraiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("appraiser_id") REFERENCES appraisers ("appraiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appraisals_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appraisers" (
  "appraiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appraiser */,
  "appraiser_name" TEXT /* Full name of the appraiser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the appraiser */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the appraiser */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the appraiser */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the appraiser */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the appraiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appraiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, buyer, appraiser, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, edit, admin) */,
  "user_groups" TEXT /* Groups the user belongs to */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the trend is recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "price_index" REAL /* Price index value for the region */,
  "market_activity" TEXT /* Description of market activity in the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Price trend in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "feature_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_category" TEXT /* Category of the image */,
  "image_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
